channel.title: GNtech
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from GNtech, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Skye's AI iPhone Home Screen App Attracts Investors Before Launch
item.description: Skye secured investor backing for its AI-driven iPhone home screen app before its public debut, reflecting growing interest in on-device AI.

item.title: OpenAI Resolves Microsoft Dispute Over $50B Amazon Deal
item.description: OpenAI secured concessions from Microsoft allowing it to sell products on AWS, while Microsoft receives additional compensation under the revised agreement.

item.title: Brain Implant for Depression Moves Toward Human Trials
item.description: Motif Neurotech is preparing to test a brain-computer interface designed to treat mental health disorders, expanding the field beyond paralysis applications.

item.title: M5 MacBook Air Drops to Lowest Price Since Launch
item.description: Less than two months after its release, the M5 MacBook Air has fallen back to its lowest recorded price.
